description.en: MS COCO changed visual recognition benchmarks by emphasizing objects in natural context, segmentation masks, captions, and everyday scenes. It supported detection, segmentation, captioning, and keypoint tasks in a shared ecosystem.
description.zh: MS COCO 通过强调自然上下文中的物体、分割掩码、图像字幕和日常场景，改变了视觉识别基准。它在同一生态中支持检测、分割、字幕生成和关键点任务。

license.en: Profile image; reuse rights not stated.
license.zh: 个人资料图片；未说明复用权利。

subcaption.en: Original local explainer for the achievement flow.
subcaption.zh: 关于该成就流程的本地原创解释图。

license.en: Original local SVG redraw; source figures are not copied.
license.zh: 本地原创 SVG 重绘；未复制来源图形。

portraits.label: Tsung-Yi Lin portrait image search
portraits.usage: Find portrait candidates; open original file page and verify license.

portraits.label: Tsung-Yi Lin Wikimedia Commons image search
portraits.usage: Prefer files with clear Commons license metadata.

eventImages.usage: Look for event photographs, group photos, venue images, or archive scans.

eventImages.label: MS COCO Wikimedia Commons search
eventImages.usage: Open-license image candidates; verify each file page before using.

eventImages.label: MS COCO Library of Congress image search
eventImages.usage: Historical image candidate search; verify rights statement.

publications.label: MS COCO publication search
publications.usage: Find paper, journal, proceedings, magazine, or archive records.

publications.label: MS COCO scholar search
publications.usage: Find scholarly publications and citation trail.

review.imagePolicy: Do not use new remote images in production until source and license are verified.
nextSteps: Open sources.json and pages/ to verify primary facts.
Record accepted/rejected image candidates in notes.md.
Move approved assets into resources/images only after review.
